---
title : "Figure 7.2"
subtitle : "Minimum norm interpolator"
author : "Thimoté Dupuch"
date : today
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    theme:
      light: zephyr
      dark: darkly
engine: julia
---

```{julia}
#| echo : false
#| output : false
using Pkg
Pkg.activate("../..")
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
using LinearAlgebra, Random, Statistics, CairoMakie
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
#| echo : false
CairoMakie.set_theme!(theme_latexfonts())
CairoMakie.activate!(type = "svg")
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
blue, orange, green, pink, teal, red, yellow = Makie.wong_colors()
```

```{julia}
rng = MersenneTwister(0)
n = 10
x = rand(rng, n) .* 2 .- 1
y = randn(rng, n)
xtest = collect(-1:0.001:1)

# Pairwise squared distances matrices
D_train = (x .- x').^2
D_test = (xtest .- x').^2

# 1. Gaussian kernel (alphak = 6)
K1 = exp.(-D_train * 6)
K1_test = exp.(-D_test * 6)
alpha1 = K1 \ y
yest1 = K1_test * alpha1

# 2. Exponential kernel (alphak = 2)
K2 = exp.(-sqrt.(D_train) * 2)
K2_test = exp.(-sqrt.(D_test) * 2)
alpha2 = K2 \ y
yest2 = K2_test * alpha2

# 3. Matern kernel (s=2, alphak = 2)
K3 = (1.0 .+ sqrt.(D_train) * 2) .* exp.(-sqrt.(D_train) * 2)
K3_test = (1.0 .+ sqrt.(D_test) * 2) .* exp.(-sqrt.(D_test) * 2)
alpha3 = K3 \ y
yest3 = K3_test * alpha3

# 4. Matern kernel (s=3, alphak = 2)
K4 = (1.0 .+ sqrt.(D_train) * 2 .+ D_train * 4 / 3) .* exp.(-sqrt.(D_train) * 2)
K4_test = (1.0 .+ sqrt.(D_test) * 2 .+ D_test * 4 / 3) .* exp.(-sqrt.(D_test) * 2)
alpha4 = K4 \ y
yest4 = K4_test * alpha4
```

```{julia}
fig = Figure(size=(800, 600), fontsize=18)
ax = Axis(
    fig[1, 1], xlabel="x", ylabel="y",
    title="Interpolation Comparison",
    limits=((-1, 1), (-10, 10))
)

lines!(ax, xtest, yest2, color=pink, linewidth=2, label="Exponential (s=1)")
lines!(ax, xtest, yest3, color=:black, linewidth=2, label="Matern (s=2)")
lines!(ax, xtest, yest4, color=red, linewidth=2, label="Matern (s=3)")
lines!(ax, xtest, yest1, color=blue, linewidth=2, label="Gaussian")

scatter!(ax, x, y, color=green, markersize=16, label="data")

axislegend(ax, position=:rt)

fig
```
